compatibility_policy.format: Additive-only evolution: new artifacts may be added, existing paths are stable
compatibility_policy.schema_versions: Each artifact tracks its own schema_version independently
compatibility_policy.integrity: SHA256 checksums computed at validation time; dossier is revalidatable offline

entries.title: PORT: NUMA memory-policy family (set/get_mempolicy + mbind + migrate_pages + move_pages + set_mempolicy_home_node)
entries.close_reason: shipped: 6 NUMA memory-policy syscall wrappers + raw_syscall_with_errno_long helper + 6 abi tests including round-trip MPOL_DEFAULT and live page query via move_pages

entries.title: PORT: openat2 + futex_waitv (modern Linux libc syscall wrappers)
entries.close_reason: shipped: openat2 (SYS_openat2 syscall + errno bridge) + futex_waitv (forwards to core sys_futex_waitv); 6 abi tests including happy-path open+read, struct-size validation, NULL guards, and ETIMEDOUT…

entries.close_reason: shipped: mq_clocksend + mq_clockreceive with CLOCK_REALTIME passthrough + CLOCK_MONOTONIC abstime rebasing + EINVAL guard for unknown clockids; 4 abi tests including round-trip on both clocks and ETI…

entries.title: PORT: ns_sprintrr + ns_sprintrrf (libresolv RR formatter, common types + RFC3597 fallback)

entries.close_reason: shipped: peer landed inet_neta + tests in fa4643e0 right before my commit; my local edits duplicated theirs and merged cleanly. impl + 5 abi tests covering trailing/internal/special-zero cases + EMSG…
